Implements a reminder application with voice dictation, timeline integration, and preference management.


## Files
- **[reminder_app.c](reminder_app.c.md)**: Implements a reminder application for Pebble firmware, handling voice dictation and timeline integration.
- **[reminder_app.h](reminder_app.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata information about the reminder app in Pebble firmware.
- **[reminder_app_prefs.h](reminder_app_prefs.h.md)**: Defines data structures and constants for managing reminder app preferences and states.
